title: Intense Malty Uruguayan Beef Casserole
description: A kid-friendly Uruguayan dish featuring tinned tomatoes and a malty flavor, with a cheese-pull and low-carb friendly ingredients. This casserole is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, cook the ground beef over medium-high heat until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the malt extract, onion powder, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Stir in the crushed tinned tomatoes and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the mixture cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Top the mixture with the shredded cheese.
Cover the dish with the papillote parchment paper, creating a tight seal.
Bake the casserole for 25 minutes, then remove the parchment paper and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
